title: apium graveolens subsp. dulce
intro: Apium graveolens subsp. dulce, also known as sweet fennel or Florence fennel, is a subspecies of the fennel plant and is characterized by its edible bulb. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and act as an expectorant to aid in respiratory problems. The health benefits of sweet fennel include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce symptoms of menstrual cramps. Sweet fennel can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and essential oils, which can be used to alleviate a range of health issues.
